contexts.context: ...frozen leagues of glaciers, propped up in towering <mark>pyramids</mark> or shapeless heaps, or opening into yawning gulphs...

...would not be recognized at the foot of the <mark>Pyramids</mark>.
...of the Nile, or the foot of the <mark>Pyramid</mark>, should express themselves in language which would appear...
